headline: Mathys Detourbet
body: 🚨 Manchester City send Mathys Detourbet to AS Monaco on loan after signing him from Troyes: all documents are signed. 🔃🇫🇷 Detourbet left City Group side Troyes and signs in at Man City for €25m package with straight loan to AS Monaco, now signed 🇲🇨 AS Monaco have an option to extend the loan until 2028, as FabriceHawkins reports. Man City have a specific clause if they want to bring back the player earlier.
raw_text:
🚨 Manchester City send Mathys Detourbet to AS Monaco on loan after signing him from Troyes: all documents are signed. 🔃🇫🇷

Detourbet left City Group side Troyes and signs in at Man City for €25m package with straight loan to AS Monaco, now signed 🇲🇨

AS Monaco have an option to extend the loan until 2028, as @FabriceHawkins reports.

Man City have a specific clause if they want to bring back the player earlier.
text:

AS Monaco have an option to extend the loan until 2028, as @FabriceHawkins reports.

Man City have a specific clause if they want to bring back the player earlier.
draft_caption:
🔄 LOAN- MATHYS DETOURBET CONFIRMED LOAN MOVE TO MANCHESTER CITY.
💰 PRICE — €25M
📝 CONTRACT — TBD
